description: theHarvester is a tool for gathering OSINT: emails, names, subdomains, IPs, and URLs from public sources (search engines, PGP key servers, SHODAN).
name: theHarvester
summary: Email, subdomain, and name harvester (search engines, PGP, ...).

trust.notes: Operator-curated Python library. The pip name is resolved from PyPI; the import name is verified against the registry.

use_cases: Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner; review provenance before use.
